name: @trackx/api
description: Fastify API service for TrackX transactions.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trackx/config build && pnpm --filter @trackx/db build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @trackx/config build && pnpm --filter @trackx/db build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @trackx/config build && pnpm --filter @trackx/db build && pnpm --filter @trackx/shared build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
